title: The hero’s quiet call
description: A game concept currently in development. In this light-hearted adventure game, you play as a legendary hero known for slaying beasts and saving kingdoms. But this time, the quest isn’t about violence or glory — it’s about rebuilding a struggling village through a series of unexpected, everyday tasks. What begins as a reluctant favor turns into a heartfelt journey of growth, community, and perspective.
reflection:
Honestly, my baby in many regards. This project was an idea of mine for my Storytelling module in 2024. It came to my mind during a really frustrating session of machine embroidering a present for a loved one. The moment is still present with me after 1.5 years.

Before this project, I went through one of the roughest times of my life and was experiencing a lot of grief. But this kind of came through like an updraft and lifted me a lot.

For my bachelor project, I went through the notion of creating a tool to make this project more feasible for myself. During this time, I also put a lot more thought into worldbuilding and character development. My partner was kind enough to provide illustrations for this project and got entangled in the whole process, which added another layer of personal attachment to this idea.

This project is very much still only a concept and has not yet entered the production stage.
